title: Documented Override ≠ Compliance — no audit-paint state transitions
statement: Audit, paper-trail, or annotation fields recording a policy violation MUST NOT transform the violation into a state of compliance. Adding a field named 'override', 'documented_exception', 'truth_delivered', or any similar audit-paint construct to a structure that records a policy violation does not constitute a state transition on the policy axis. The correct move is fix-baseline or shrink-deliverable; never annotate-and-proceed.
rationale: Compliance state is a property of the policy, not of the audit trail. A field that says 'we documented that we violated the rule' still records a violation. Compliance requires the violation to not have occurred (fix-baseline) or to not be in scope (shrink-deliverable). Annotation as compliance-substitute was attempted by a prior chat-layer agent (TRUTH-DELIVERED override field proposal); refused by Erik on principle.

authority.author: EB-agent (chat), L1; relayed via schema-registry chat (Claude L1)

human-loop.gate: Chat layer self-enforces by refusing to author override/exception/audit-paint fields on red-CI structures. Erik (L4) refuses such proposals when chat layer suggests them.
human-loop.automationPath: JSON schema constraint on TRUTH-DELIVERED, status-report, and similar structured-output schemas: forbid 'override', 'documented_exception', and audit-paint field names. Schema-level enforcement means the structure itself cannot be authored — not just unenforceable, but unrepresentable.

automated.predicate: Structured outputs (TRUTH-DELIVERED, status reports, deliverable instances) MUST NOT contain fields named 'override', 'documented_exception', 'truth_delivered_override', or similar audit-paint constructs on records that capture a policy violation. Enforced via JSON Schema constraints on the relevant output schemas.
automated.ciSurface: Schema validation via meta-schema-check.yml and output-schema-validation workflows. Each consumer schema (TRUTH-DELIVERED schema when authored, etc.) carries the constraint as part of its required structure.

refine.action: Branch off main, edit this rule instance, validate, PR.

transitions.trigger: Rule instance authored 2026-06-01; statement captured from EB-agent contribution citing prior chat-layer agent TRUTH-DELIVERED override proposal refused by Erik.

gatingBinding.gatedWork: any structured-output schema that records policy compliance (TRUTH-DELIVERED, status reports, deliverable lifecycleState transitions)

notes: Originated via EB-agent contribution (Evidence #2). Origin incident: prior chat-layer agent proposed adding a TRUTH-DELIVERED override field to record policy-violating merges as 'documented and proceeding'; Erik refused on principle. Same axis as RULE-CI-UNSTABLE-GATES-IDENTICALLY-RED-1 (both encode CI gating discipline). Distinct from #3 in mechanism: #3 prevents the violation at merge time; #4 prevents schemas from being authored in ways that would let the violation be recorded as compliance. Credit: EB-agent for rule shape.
